markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize contract expansion and align on new template strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Contract Approved:** The $40k proposal is approved, expanding scope to 10 templates/week (5 website, 5 tools).](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [**New Focus: Tools:** Lovable's B2B team will provide input for new "tool" templates, targeting internal business use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [**Content Automation:** A new bot will auto-merge content PRs, eliminating manual review bottlenecks and enabling a 3-guide/day sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [**Growth Strategy:** Lovable's 2026 plan is to layer paid ads and SEO onto its core, word-of-mouth growth engine.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)

## Topics

### Contract Expansion & New Scope

  - [The $40k proposal is approved, expanding scope to 10 templates/week.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [**New Template Mix:**](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [5 website templates (existing categories)](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [5 "tool" templates (new focus)](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This mix provides early performance data on tools to inform a potential future ramp-up to 15 templates/week.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [**Contract Logistics:**](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
      - [GrowthX will draft an amendment.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
      - [Sam connected GrowthX with Penila (Lovable) to finalize.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)

### New Focus: Tool Templates

  - [**Development:** GrowthX engineers are building a tool-specific workflow, with initial tests scheduled for tonight/tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Mix tool templates into weekly production to gather performance data within 1–2 months.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [**B2B Input:** Lovable's B2B team (Talia) will join an upcoming call to provide ideas for internal business tools.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [**Keyword Research:** Megan has identified thousands of tool-related keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [**Prioritization:** Templates will target two key personas:](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [**Ambitious Solopreneur:** For B2C self-serve users.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [**Resourceful Product Builder:** For B2B internal builders.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [**Data Needs:** Sam will provide data to refine targeting:](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [Top-built tools on Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [ICP documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

### Content Production & Automation

  - [**Current Sprint:** Producing 3 guides/day to hit the 381-keyword target.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [**Automation:** A new bot will auto-merge content PRs, eliminating manual review bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:** The bot will enable a consistent 3-guides/day schedule, ending the need for batched publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Action Item:** Megan will check with Nico (GrowthX) on the status of the PR to update date-specific content (e.g., "Top 5 Coding Apps of 2025").](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

### Lovable's 2026 Growth Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Accelerate growth by layering new channels on top of the core word-of-mouth engine.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**New Growth Channels:**](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
      - [Paid advertising](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
      - [Organic marketing (SEO, AEO)](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
      - [CRM optimization](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
      - [Brand activations (e.g., "Lovable Day," hackathons)](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [**Customer-Centric Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
      - [**Focus:** Make customers highly reliant on Lovable to drive platform usage and virality.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
      - [**Examples:** Provide native SEO, email tools, and ad integrations.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
      - [**Marketing Idea:** Fund advertising for customers to showcase their success, creating a win-win.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George (GrowthX):** Draft contract amendment and connect with Penila (Lovable).](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [**Megan (GrowthX):** Check with Nico on the status of the date-specific content PR.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
  - [**Sam (Lovable):** Provide data on top-built tools and ICP documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [**Sam (Lovable):** Invite Talia (B2B) to the next sync.](https://fathom.video/share/WSxiYhCxBE5CVhcKdJzf6VsYxUjF_gUC?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
